name: IQCDL Foundation Level
description: 3-day Foundation certification for leaders, CISOs, IT managers and compliance — covers quantum risk, post-quantum cryptography, Mosca's Theorem, NIST FIPS 203/204/205 and migration planning. No coding required.
teaches: Quantum risk, post-quantum cryptography (PQC), NIST FIPS 203/204/205, Mosca's Theorem, migration planning, leadership-level cryptographic literacy.

offers.category: International base price; regional pricing applies (see https://iqcdl.org/pricing)
